commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the gateway agent prompt formatter to strip internal metadata and omit standalone stream-error fallback text, with focused tests for omission and diagnostic-text preservation.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main passes assistant content through safeBody into gateway prompt history without filtering the stream-error sentinel. I did not run tests because this review was constrained to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is appropriate because the remaining blocker is contributor-side real behavior proof, not a concrete code defect for automation to fix.

target.title: fix(gateway): omit stream-error placeholders from agent prompts
target.body:
## Summary

- Strip the internal stream-error fallback sentinel from gateway agent prompt history.
- Keep ordinary diagnostic text that merely mentions the sentinel string.
- Reuse the existing internal metadata display sanitizer before formatting gateway conversation history.

## Why

OpenClaw uses `[assistant turn failed before producing content]` as an internal non-empty sentinel for failed assistant turns so provider replay paths do not receive empty assistant content. That sentinel should not be treated as normal model-authored text when gateway OpenAI/OpenResponses prompt history is formatted for the next model turn.

Without this guard, a historical internal failure marker can be replayed as assistant text and then reproduced as a user-visible final answer. This change omits only the exact standalone sentinel from gateway prompt history while preserving normal diagnostic text that mentions the marker.

## Tests

- `corepack pnpm test src/gateway/agent-prompt.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm format:check src/gateway/agent-prompt.ts src/gateway/agent-prompt.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm lint:core -- src/gateway/agent-prompt.ts src/gateway/agent-prompt.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `git diff --check`

No live Gateway/runtime testing was used for this source-level prompt-formatting change.
